changes: Replaced all magic numbers with named constants (CELL_SIZE, GRID_COLS, INITIAL_SPEED_MS, etc.)
Fixed food spawning on snake body (was possible before)
Added progressive speed increase — every 5 food eaten, interval decreases by 8ms (min 50ms)
Added session high score tracking with 'New Best!' indicator
Distinguished snake head from body with darker green
Improved game over screen layout (score on separate line, high score indicator)
Snake now spawns at grid center instead of hardcoded (10,10)
Added comment block with controls and mechanics description
All variable names are descriptive: direction not dir, segment not s, CANVAS_WIDTH not W
